file_structure.description: Kubernetes Namespace manifest for sigma-1 with required labels
ExternalSecret CRD for Linear API token
ExternalSecret CRD for Discord webhook URL
ExternalSecret CRD for NOUS_API_KEY (optional, with annotation)
ExternalSecret CRD for GitHub PAT
Kubernetes Job to validate secrets are non-empty, with conditional logic for optional NOUS_API_KEY
ServiceAccount and RoleBinding for secret-validation-job to read secrets
ConfigMap with service endpoint URLs for downstream tasks
Kubernetes Job to verify cross-namespace service health checks
Documentation of backing store paths, ConfigMap contract, and manual prerequisites

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# infra/tests/infra-validation.test.sh
# (Bash script outline for manual/automated validation)

# 1. Namespace exists and is labeled
kubectl get ns sigma-1 --show-labels

# 2. ExternalSecrets exist and are synced
kubectl get externalsecret -n sigma-1

# 3. Secret validation job completes successfully
kubectl logs job/secret-validation-job -n sigma-1

# 4. ConfigMap contains all expected keys
kubectl get configmap sigma-1-infra-endpoints -n sigma-1 -o json | jq '.data'

# 5. Health check job passes
kubectl logs job/health-check-job -n sigma-1

file_structure.description: Kubernetes Namespace manifest for sigma-1 with required labels

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: Namespace exists and is labeled
kubectl get ns sigma-1 --show-labels
kubectl get ns sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.phase}'

file_structure.description: ExternalSecret CRD for Linear API token

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: Linear ExternalSecret is synced
kubectl get externalsecret sigma-1-linear-token -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].reason}'
kubectl get secret sigma-1-linear-token -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.data.LINEAR_API_TOKEN}'

file_structure.description: ExternalSecret CRD for Discord webhook URL

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: Discord webhook ExternalSecret is synced
kubectl get externalsecret sigma-1-discord-webhook -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].reason}'
kubectl get secret sigma-1-discord-webhook -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.data.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL}'

file_structure.description: ExternalSecret CRD for NOUS_API_KEY (optional, with annotation)

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: NOUS_API_KEY ExternalSecret exists (may be unsynced if key is missing)
kubectl get externalsecret sigma-1-nous-api-key -n sigma-1
kubectl get secret sigma-1-nous-api-key -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.data.NOUS_API_KEY}'

file_structure.description: ExternalSecret CRD for GitHub PAT

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: GitHub token ExternalSecret is synced
kubectl get externalsecret sigma-1-github-token -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].reason}'
kubectl get secret sigma-1-github-token -n sigma-1 -o jsonpath='{.data.GITHUB_TOKEN}'

file_structure.description: Kubernetes Job to validate secrets are non-empty, with conditional logic for optional NOUS_API_KEY
ServiceAccount and RoleBinding for secret-validation-job to read secrets

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: Secret validation job completes successfully
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/secret-validation-job -n sigma-1 --timeout=120s
kubectl logs job/secret-validation-job -n sigma-1

file_structure.description: ConfigMap with service endpoint URLs for downstream tasks

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: ConfigMap contains all expected keys
kubectl get configmap sigma-1-infra-endpoints -n sigma-1 -o json | jq '.data'

file_structure.description: Kubernetes Job to verify cross-namespace service health checks

scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test: Health check job passes
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/health-check-job -n sigma-1 --timeout=60s
kubectl logs job/health-check-job -n sigma-1
